login.title: Cafe Social
login.subtitle: Location-locked social gaming for cafés.
login.verifySubtitle: We sent a code to your email. Enter it below.
login.signInFailed: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.subtitle: Sign up with your email or a social account.
signUp.verifySubtitle: We sent a code to {{email}}. Enter it below.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: Applies immediately. Saved on this device.
settings.locationHint: We use your location only to detect which partner café you are near. You can deny access and still paste a venue code manually.
settings.notificationsHint: Choose which kinds of pushes we may send (word matches vs. partner offers). OS settings always apply.
settings.pushPartnerFootnote: Venue order nudges still respect “Total privacy” on the server.
settings.accountHint: Manage email and security in your Clerk profile (we’ll link deeper later).
settings.privacyHint: Discoverable: others can find you for challenges. Subscribers also see discoverable subscribers away from venues. Total privacy hides you from everyone for social features.
settings.friendInviteHint: Anyone with the link can add you as a friend after they sign in.

home.noVenueYet: No venue detected yet. Enable location or move near a partner café.
home.lockedHint: Locked. Scan the QR code (or paste the venue code) to unlock play and challenges.
home.venueFeedEmpty: No recent activity yet — start a match or solve the venue daily.
home.friendsVisitedVenue: {{count}} friends have visited this venue in the last 30 days.

dailyWord.title: Daily word
dailyWord.outOfAttempts: Come back tomorrow for a new word.
dailyWord.needVenue: Detect a venue to play the venue daily.

challenges.title: Challenges
challenges.weekly: Weekly challenge — progress resets each ISO week (UTC).

chooseGame.title: Choose a game
chooseGame.subtitle: Pick one of the available games to start your session.
chooseGame.wordDescription: Solo, co-op, or versus guessing with venue challenges.
chooseGame.wordNeedsVenue: Detect a venue first to play.
chooseGame.brawlerDescription: Short chaotic arena battles with heroes and power-ups.

wordLobby.title: Word Game
wordLobby.appLanguageDeck: Word deck language (solo & when you host): {{lang}}
wordLobby.modeSoloHint: Play alone; your challenge can progress when you finish.
wordLobby.modeCoopHint: Create a room, share the code — one shared word at a time; everyone wins together.
wordLobby.modeVersusHint: Same word list for each player; first to finish all words wins.
wordLobby.cardSub: When you finish, we’ll update your in-venue challenge when rules allow.

wordMatch.joinSubtitle: Enter the 6-character room code from your friend.
wordMatch.waitCoop: Co-op: work through the same words together.
wordMatch.waitVersus: Versus: race to finish the deck first.
wordMatch.waitForFriend: Waiting for a friend to join…

wordGame.title: Word Game
wordGame.emptyDeck: No words are available right now. Try again later.
wordGame.matchDeckError: Could not load match deck. Ask the host to start the game.
wordGame.matchLost: Good effort — someone else finished first.
wordGame.coopHint: Anyone in the room can submit the next guess.

qr.title: Unlock venue
qr.subtitle: Scan the QR at the café or paste the venue id (UUID) from the poster.
qr.cameraDisabled: Camera QR scanning is temporarily disabled. Paste the venue id below and tap Unlock.
qr.webNoCamera: QR scan isn’t available on web — paste the venue id below.
qr.cameraDenied: Camera access is off. Enable it in Settings or paste the code.
qr.cameraPrompt: Allow camera to scan venue QR codes.
qr.scanUnrecognized: That QR isn’t a venue code we recognize.
qr.emptyCode: Code is empty. Paste a valid venue id.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: XP at your current venue (per-venue stats).
leaderboard.subtitleVenue: XP at the venue you’re detected at right now.
leaderboard.subtitleGlobal: Total XP summed across all partner venues.
leaderboard.subtitleCountryGeneric: Total XP by country (uses detected venue’s country).
leaderboard.subtitleCityGeneric: Total XP by city (uses detected venue’s city + country).
leaderboard.needCountry: We need a detected venue with a country set. Visit a partner café or enable location.
leaderboard.needCityCountry: We need city + country from your detected venue for this ladder.
leaderboard.emptyVenue: No venue detected. Enable location or visit a partner café to see rankings.
leaderboard.emptyBoard: No scores yet. Play to earn XP!

parties.title: Parties
parties.empty: No parties yet. Create one or redeem an invite.
parties.createFailed: Could not create party (free tier: max 2 you create).
parties.haveInvite: Have an invite link or token? Redeem →
parties.leaveConfirm: You can rejoin with a new invite unless the party is full.
parties.kickConfirm: {{name}} will be removed from this party.
parties.transferConfirm: Make {{name}} the leader? You will lose leader powers unless you are selected again.

friends.title: Friends
friends.addByUsernameHint: Search is case-insensitive. They’ll get a request to accept.
friends.requestAlreadyPending: A request already exists or you’re already friends.

perk.title: Redeem perk
perk.subtitle: Enter the code from the venue (you must be on premise). Staff may ask you to scan a QR for some offers.
perk.needVenue: Be detected at the venue (or open this from Home while you’re there).
perk.showToStaff: Show this screen to staff if they need proof.

redeem.title: Redeem invite
redeem.hint: Paste the token from a party or friend invite, or open a cafesocial:// link.

peopleHere.title: Who's here
peopleHere.subtitle: Players recently at this venue (respects privacy).
peopleHere.empty: Nobody visible right now — check discoverability in Settings or try again in a minute.
